title: mitos chart values
description: Schema for the mitos Helm chart values. Unknown keys fail at install time so a misspelled value cannot deploy silently misconfigured. Maps the chart intends as free-form passthrough (resources, labels, annotations, extraEnv, tolerations, nodeSelector, rate tables) stay open.

componentImage.description: Per-component image reference, composed as image.registry/repository:tag.

tag.description: Image tag; empty defaults to the chart appVersion (or global.imageTag when set).

pullPolicy.description: Image pull policy for the container.

secretRef.description: Reference to an existing Secret by name and key; values are injected via secretKeyRef only, never inline.

name.description: Name of the Secret in the release namespace; empty omits the env.

key.description: Key within that Secret holding the value.

resources.description: Kubernetes container resource requests and limits, rendered verbatim (may include extended resources such as mitos.run/kvm).

podDisruptionBudget.description: Opt-in PodDisruptionBudget; enable only when replicas > 1 so node drains are never blocked.

enabled.description: Render the PodDisruptionBudget.

minAvailable.description: minAvailable for the PDB; an integer count or a percentage string.

enabled.description: Render the Ingress resource.

annotations.description: Annotations applied verbatim to the Ingress resource.

name.description: Name of the ClusterIssuer or Issuer.

extraEnv.description: Extra env var entries appended verbatim to the container.

rateMap.description: Map of rate keys to numeric values, rendered as one JSON env value; unknown keys fail the binary at startup.

image.description: Image settings shared by every component.

registry.description: Container registry that hosts every mitos image.

global.description: Global overrides applied across all components.

imageTag.description: When set, this tag overrides every per-component image.tag.

nameOverride.description: Override for the chart name used in resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override for the fully qualified release name used in resource names.

controller.description: Controller Deployment: reconciles the mitos.run CRDs and drives forkd.

replicas.description: Number of controller replicas; multiple replicas run HA with leader election.

enableHuskPods.description: Render --enable-husk-pods so each SandboxPool maintains a warm pool of pre-scheduled husk pods.

huskDataDir.description: Value for --husk-data-dir, the node template snapshot root the husk pods mount; must match forkd's --data-dir.

huskDnsUpstream.description: Value for --husk-dns-upstream; empty omits the flag, a comma-separated resolver list enables name-based egress allowlists.

kvmResourceName.description: The extended resource name husk pods request for KVM scheduling.

namespacedSecretsRBAC.description: When true, the controller's cluster-wide Secrets grant is removed in favor of per-namespace bindings.

poolSecretsClusterRoleName.description: Name of the chart-provisioned ClusterRole the controller binds per pool namespace for Secrets access.

orgTenancy.description: Per-org namespace tenancy, the hosted-SaaS multi-tenant boundary (issue #288).

enabled.description: Render --enable-org-tenancy so the controller runs the OrgReconciler.

defaultMaxSandboxes.description: Default per-org sandbox and pod count ceiling for an Org's ResourceQuota.

defaultCPU.description: Default per-org aggregate CPU limit ceiling, a Kubernetes quantity.

defaultMemory.description: Default per-org aggregate memory limit ceiling, a Kubernetes quantity.

poolTemplate.description: Per-org SandboxPool cloned from a reference pool: when name is set, clone that pool's full spec into every org namespace with warm.min overridden.

name.description: Reference SandboxPool to clone; empty disables per-org pools.

namespace.description: Namespace of the reference pool; empty defaults to the release namespace.

orgPoolName.description: Name the cloned pool takes per org; empty defaults to name.

warmMin.description: warm.min override on the cloned pool.

usage.description: Usage metering: the per-org metering scraper and the bearer-gated internal usage API.

collector.description: Run the collector and serve the internal usage API.

apiAddress.description: Internal usage API listen address in :port form; the container and Service port derive from it.

extraArgs.description: Extra args appended verbatim to the controller container args.

huskStub.description: huskStub image: the image husk pods run, passed to the controller via --husk-stub-image.

forkd.description: forkd DaemonSet: the per-node privileged snapshot builder on nodes labeled mitos.run/kvm=true.

priorityClassName.description: Priority class so forkd is never evicted under resource pressure; empty disables.

dataDir.description: Value for forkd --data-dir and the data hostPath mountPath.

enableNetworking.description: Render --enable-networking so forkd bakes the eth0 placeholder NIC into every husk template snapshot.

seccompProfile.description: forkd container seccomp profile, rendered verbatim into securityContext.seccompProfile (issue #525).

localhostProfile.description: Path of the Localhost seccomp profile relative to the kubelet seccomp root.

extraCapabilities.description: Extra Linux capabilities added to forkd's hardened base set; the base set is not removable here.

nodeSelector.description: nodeSelector pinning forkd to KVM nodes.

tolerations.description: Tolerations so forkd lands on dedicated, tainted KVM workers; rendered verbatim.

devicePlugin.description: KVM device plugin DaemonSet: advertises mitos.run/kvm only where /dev/kvm exists.

enabled.description: Gate the device plugin DaemonSet.

kernelProvisioner.description: Kernel provisioner DaemonSet: stages the guest kernel into the node hostPath on KVM nodes.

enabled.description: Gate the kernel-stage DaemonSet.

kernelUrl.description: The guest kernel image URL the init container downloads.

kernelSha256.description: Expected SHA256 hex of the kernel at kernelUrl; when set the init container fails closed on mismatch.

admissionWebhook.description: Validating admission webhook that binds Sandbox.spec.serviceAccount to RBAC.

enabled.description: Render the webhook configuration and service.

port.description: Container and Service port the controller serves the webhook on.

failurePolicy.description: Webhook failure policy; Fail rejects a claim if the webhook is unreachable.

apiV2.description: Retained no-op placeholder from the completed v1 migration so existing values files do not fail.

poolConversionWebhook.description: No-op placeholder; mitos.run/v1 is the only served group-version.

enabled.description: No-op; retained for values-file compatibility.

facade.description: Facade Deployment: the agents.x-k8s.io conformance facade, opt-in.

enabled.description: Gate the facade Deployment plus its ServiceAccount and RBAC.

defaultPool.description: The mitos.run pool a Sandbox binds to when it carries no bridge annotation.

clusterDomain.description: The cluster DNS domain the facade uses to build in-cluster URLs.

canary.description: Synthetic canary Deployment: continuously forks and execs a sandbox and exports mitos_canary_up.

enabled.description: Gate the whole canary: Deployment, Service, ServiceMonitor, optional Secret.

pool.description: Template the canary forks each cycle; keep it small for a fast, cheap probe.

cycleTimeout.description: Whole-cycle deadline covering create, exec, verify, terminate.

stalenessWindow.description: Liveness fails if the probe loop has not ticked within this window.

baseURL.description: API base URL; empty auto-resolves the in-cluster gateway.

apiKeySecretName.description: Name of the Secret holding the api key under the key api-key.

apiKeySecretExternal.description: When true, the Secret is assumed to exist already and the chart never renders it.

apiKey.description: A scoped mitos_live_ token; prefer leaving empty and creating the Secret out of band.

serviceMonitor.description: ServiceMonitor for the canary; needs the Prometheus Operator and monitoring.enabled.

enabled.description: Render a ServiceMonitor.

monitoring.description: Monitoring artifacts: the PrometheusRule, the Grafana dashboard ConfigMap, and the PodMonitors.

enabled.description: Gate the PrometheusRule, the dashboard ConfigMap, and the PodMonitors.

prometheusRuleRelease.description: Label value selected by the Prometheus Operator ruleSelector for the rule.

podMonitors.description: PodMonitors that make the control-plane metrics the alerts depend on actually get scraped.

enabled.description: Render PodMonitors for the controller and forkd.

name.description: The namespace name; all namespaced resources are placed here.

create.description: Render the Namespace object with the PodSecurity admission labels forkd requires.

imagePullSecret.description: Optional dockerconfigjson Secret for a private mirror of the mitos images.

create.description: Render the dockerconfigjson Secret named below.

name.description: The Secret name rendered when create=true.

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secret names attached to every workload pod spec, rendered verbatim.

commonLabels.description: Extra labels merged onto every resource the chart renders.

database.description: Durable persistence for the front door: bring your own managed Postgres, referenced as a Secret.

console.description: Console Deployment: the hosted or self-hosted web console; one image serves both editions.

enabled.description: Render the console Deployment, Service, optional Ingress, ServiceAccount, and RBAC.

edition.description: Runtime edition value; community for self-host, hosted for the SaaS.

replicas.description: Console replicas; more than one requires a shared session store first.

signup.description: Self-serve org signup; defaults off (waitlist mode), server-controlled per the #208 gate.

signupCreditCents.description: Free credit granted to a newly verified signup, in integer cents; 0 renders no env.

autoAllowDomains.description: Email domains whose signups bypass the manual allowlist approval, rendered comma-joined.

authConnectors.description: Social-login connectors advertised at GET /auth/connectors; known values are github and google.

antiAbuse.description: Signup anti-abuse knobs; everything defaults off or empty.

friendlyCaptcha.description: Friendly Captcha server-side verification; active only when both sitekey and secret ref are set.

siteKey.description: The public Friendly Captcha sitekey; not a secret.

url.description: Verification API base URL override; empty uses the binary's built-in default endpoint.

disposableAllowDomains.description: Email domains exempted from the disposable-email-domain blocklist, rendered comma-joined.

signupIPLimit.description: Per-IP signup velocity cap; empty renders no env, 0 disables the cap entirely.

signupIPWindow.description: Per-IP signup velocity window, a Go duration string such as 30m.

oidc.description: Browser-session OIDC; self-host points this at the operator's issuer.

issuerURL.description: OIDC issuer URL the console trusts.

clientID.description: OIDC client ID registered at the issuer.

clientSecretRef.description: Name of an existing Secret with key client-secret; empty omits it.

redirectURL.description: The OAuth redirect_uri the console sends to the IdP, normally https://<console-host>/auth/callback.

usage.description: Usage read side: where the console reads per-org usage from.

url.description: Base URL of the controller's internal usage API; empty derives the in-cluster Service URL.

secrets.description: Secret-store providers advertised in capabilities and wired into the binary.

kube.description: The kube provider materializes org secrets as org-namespaced Secrets.

enabled.description: Enable the kube secret provider.

openbao.description: The OpenBao or Vault external provider.

enabled.description: Enable the OpenBao provider.

perOrg.description: Per-tenant isolation mode: path or namespace.

billing.description: Billing surface; hosted sets true, community keeps it off so the billing routes never mount.

enabled.description: Enable the billing surface.

paddle.description: Paddle Merchant of Record configuration; secrets ride secretKeyRef only.

baseURL.description: Paddle API host; empty uses the binary's built-in live default.

topUpProduct.description: Paddle product id used for prepaid credit top-up checkout; empty disables the top-up affordance.

currency.description: ISO currency code for top-up checkout; empty defaults to EUR in the binary.

onboarding.description: Public self-serve onboarding: verification email delivery and optional tenant provisioning.

verifyURL.description: The base URL the verification link points at; required when SMTP is configured.

clusterProvisioning.description: When true, a verified signup creates the cluster-scoped Org custom resource.

smtp.description: SMTP delivery for the verification email; credentials come from a Secret only.

host.description: SMTP host; empty uses the dev log sender and no real email is delivered.

from.description: From address for the verification email.

credentialsSecretRef.description: Name of an existing Secret with keys username and password; empty omits the auth env.

gateway.description: Gateway Deployment: the public customer API front door with API-key auth, org resolution, and quota.

enabled.description: Render the gateway Deployment, Service, and RBAC.

enforce.description: Abuse-control enforcement: quotas, rate limits, and the kill-switch.

enabled.description: Enforce per-org quotas, rate limits, the size cap, and the kill-switch before forwarding.

trustedProxyHops.description: Number of trusted reverse-proxy hops used to resolve the client IP; 0 keys on RemoteAddr.

singleTenantNamespace.description: When non-empty, pins all sandbox operations to this fixed namespace instead of per-org namespaces.

telemetry.description: Product telemetry: privacy-first, opt-in, off-by-default pipeline of non-PII product-usage events.

enabled.description: Opt-in switch; default false renders no telemetry env.

optOut.description: Force-disable even if enabled=true; an explicit per-deploy opt-out.

endpoint.description: The collector endpoint the network sink POSTs JSON to; required when enabled, empty fails closed.

expose.description: Expose proxy Deployment: terminates TLS for wildcard sandbox preview URLs and proxies to the sandbox.

enabled.description: Gate the expose-proxy Deployment, Service, and optional Ingress and Certificate.

domain.description: The expose domain, for example mitos.app; required when expose.enabled is true.

ingress.description: Optional Ingress for the expose proxy.

enabled.description: Gate the Ingress resource for the expose proxy.

annotations.description: Annotations applied verbatim to the Ingress resource.

tls.description: TLS for the wildcard preview domain.

certManager.description: cert-manager issues a wildcard Certificate via the named issuer.

enabled.description: Render a cert-manager Certificate for the wildcard domain.

secretName.description: The TLS Secret mounted into the proxy at /tls.
Name of the Secret holding the signing-secret, admin-token, and related keys, created out of band.

oidc.description: OIDC relying-party configuration for the central auth origin; empty issuer means token-only mode.

issuer.description: OIDC discovery issuer URL; empty disables OIDC.

clientID.description: OIDC client ID registered at the issuer.

identityResolve.description: Identity resolve endpoint: the in-cluster console service that maps a verified email to org IDs.

resolveURL.description: URL of the resolve endpoint; empty skips the resolve hop.

dex.description: Dex in-cluster OIDC federator: federates GitHub and Google into a single OIDC issuer the console trusts.

enabled.description: Gate the Dex ConfigMap, Deployment, and Service.

issuer.description: OIDC issuer URL Dex advertises; must match the ingress path Dex is reachable at.

console.description: Static OIDC client registered in Dex for the console.

clientID.description: OIDC client ID; set console.oidc.clientID to the same value.

redirectURL.description: The OAuth redirect_uri Dex registers for the console.

connectorsSecret.description: Name of an existing Secret holding the GitHub and Google OAuth credentials.

consoleClientSecret.description: Name of an existing Secret holding the console static-client secret under key client-secret.

frontdoor.description: Front-door reverse proxy: single-origin entry point routing marketing and console paths.

enabled.description: Gate the frontdoor Deployment and Service.

marketingURL.description: In-cluster URL of the marketing static-site Service; empty derives the default.

consoleURL.description: In-cluster URL of the console Service; empty derives the default.

sessionResolveURL.description: In-cluster URL of the console session-resolve endpoint; empty derives the default.

marketingPagesAddrs.description: GitHub Pages anycast IP:port addresses for the marketing upstream; empty means in-cluster mode.

edge.description: Cilium Gateway-API edge resources: Gateway, Certificate, HTTPRoutes, CiliumNetworkPolicy.

enabled.description: Gate all edge-gateway resources.

gatewayClassName.description: GatewayClass name used by the Cilium Gateway-API integration.

hostname.description: Primary hostname for the edge gateway and certificate.

tls.description: TLS for the edge gateway listener.

secretName.description: Name of the TLS Secret created by cert-manager and referenced by the Gateway listener.

marketing.description: Marketing static site: serves the Astro-built public marketing pages behind the front-door.

enabled.description: Gate the marketing Deployment and Service.

containerPort.description: Container port the marketing image listens on.

image.description: Full OCI image reference for the marketing static site; required when marketing.enabled is true.

networkPolicy.description: Network policy profiles (CiliumNetworkPolicy; requires Cilium). Control-plane only; husk/sandbox egress isolation is separate and always on.

controlPlane.description: Opt-in egress lockdown for controller/console/gateway; the console SMTP allow is derived from console.onboarding.smtp.

enabled.description: Render the default-deny control-plane egress profile.

extraEgress.description: Extra CiliumNetworkPolicy egress rule objects appended verbatim to the shared control-plane policy.
